calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2021 Set For Trial On Dec-06-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-19-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Wonolo Inc.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings

Defendants' motion to compel arbitration is denied. Defendants state that, "less than a week after" plaintiff signed an offer letter for employment with Wonolo, Inc., Wonolo "rescinded" the offer. (Memo. 2:7-8.) Plaintiff sued for promissory estoppel and three other counts. Wonolo answered that "there was no enforceable contract" of employment, and plaintiff "cannot prove the existence of an underlying enforceable contract." (Id at 3:8-9, 4:16-17.)

Defendants nonetheless now seek to compel arbitration under provisions of the offer letter and "another document" plaintiff signed related to "my employment." However, where a plaintiff was "never employed" - as defendants here assert - "the arbitration clause does not apply." (Balandran v. Labor Ready, Inc. (2004) 124 Cal.App.4th, 1522, 1530.) Plaintiff's unconscionability points need not be reached. (Id. at 1526.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
